approvedMusicBed.title: Afro House Candidate 3 — Afro Soul Chant
approvedMusicBed.mixDirection: Use as the selected background music bed. Keep it low under dialogue, with the deep magnetic recumbent-bike whir tucked underneath. Dialogue stays dry, clear, and dominant.

currentVisualReview.purpose: Absolute production continuity lock for the parallel recumbent-bike over-the-shoulder reverse-angle template before producing video shots.
currentVisualReview.cacheRule: Use immutable timestamped filenames for review renders. Do not point the public sandbox at overwritten stable filenames for current-stage media.
absoluteContinuityLock: Only two characters exist in the whole shoot: Character A and Character B.
Character A must keep the exact face, brunette ponytail, age read, body type, makeup, skin tone, and darker mocha/taupe outfit from final-character-a-dark-taupe-20260616-220447.webp.

Character B must keep the exact face, blonde beach-wave hair, blue-eye read, age read, body type, makeup, skin tone, and sand/taupe outfit with muted teal accent from final-character-b-teal-accent-20260616-220447.webp.
Every Character A speaking shot must derive from final-camera-a-color-lock-20260616-220447.webp with only minor crop differences.
Every Character B speaking shot must derive from final-camera-b-color-lock-20260616-220447.webp with only minor crop differences.
Do not redesign either character scene to scene. Do not change faces, hair, makeup, outfits, wardrobe colors, body type, ethnicity, age, accessories, bike model, lighting, or gym layout.
Allowed variation only: dialogue lip movement, natural eye contact with the other woman, gentle pedaling, subtle shoulder/body rhythm, relaxed breath shifts, and very small crop adjustments.
No new characters, no background pedestrians, no wardrobe alternates, no camera-to-camera presenter energy, and no direct-to-lens CTA delivery.
cameraTemplate: Both recumbent bikes stay side-by-side, parallel, and facing the same direction.
Camera A looks over Character B's blurred blonde shoulder/hair toward Character A speaking.
Camera B looks over Character A's blurred brunette shoulder/ponytail toward Character B speaking.
The active speaker turns toward the other woman, not toward the camera.
The foreground listener's face and mouth are not visible.
Repeat the same two camera angles across all dialogue scenes with only minor crop differences.
requirements: Character A wears darker mocha/taupe high-end logo-free athleisure.
Character B wears sand/taupe high-end logo-free athleisure with muted teal accent to complement blonde hair and blue eyes.
Character B wardrobe must not be stark white, cream, underwear-like, lingerie-like, bra-only, or see-through.
Both recumbent bikes must be the same premium black model with matching black upholstery and matching frame design.
Wealthy, organized, well put together, believable busy moms training at an Equinox-inspired Newport Beach fitness club.
